query:
-- Reset the order so the auto-resume logic will trigger video regeneration
UPDATE orders
SET 
  videoKey = NULL,
  videoUrl = NULL,
  status = 'processing',
  completedAt = NULL,
  errorMessage = NULL
WHERE id = 30001;

-- Verify
SELECT id, childName, status, paymentStatus, storyApproved, videoKey, videoUrl, errorMessage
FROM orders
WHERE id = 30001;
